scripts.start-avatar: concurrently -n "AVATAR-CLIENT,AVATAR-SERVER" -c "magenta,yellow" "cd copy_avatar_new1/frontend && node --max-old-space-size=4096 node_modules/next/dist/bin/next dev" "cd copy_avatar_new1/backend && npm run dev"
scripts.start-all: concurrently -n "MAIN-CLIENT,MAIN-SERVER,AVATAR-CLIENT,AVATAR-SERVER" -c "blue,green,magenta,yellow" "vite" "cd server && npm run dev" "cd copy_avatar_new1/frontend && node --max-old-space-size=4096 node_modules/next/dist/bin/next dev" "cd copy_avatar_new1/backend && npm run dev"
